title: ubuntu:17.10 End of Life, build fails
body:
Build fails with "E: The Repository '[..] does not have a Release file" most likely because ubuntu:17.10 is at End of Life.

See https://wiki.ubuntu.com/Releases for Ubuntu releases.

comments.body:
Was this report targeted at the containers/image repo? AFAICS skopeo already uses a newer image.

Please reopen if there is still a problem.
An issue is, that the latest release does not contain the change and does not work due to this.
